metadata.title: Sophia Foundry
metadata.description: A game studio building the tools that AAA demands — and giving them to everyone.

hero.subline: A game studio building the tools that AAA demands — and giving them to everyone.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: AAA quality shouldn't require AAA resources. We build games. We build the tools to make them. Then we share those tools with you. Every studio, every team, every solo developer deserves access to the same power that drives the biggest productions in the world.

games.label: Games
games.title: Games
games.description: Original titles built with full conviction. Coming soon.

tools.label: Tools
tools.title: Tools
tools.forgeDescription: Studio operations platform for Unreal Engine 5. Full coherence, real-time collaboration, AI-powered.

forgeHighlight.label: Featured Product
forgeHighlight.title: Sophia Forge
forgeHighlight.pitch: The studio operations platform built for Unreal Engine 5. Sophia Forge brings full coherence to your production pipeline — asset management, task tracking, real-time collaboration, and AI-powered workflows in one unified system.

founderNote.title: A Note from the Founder
founderNote.text: I believe anyone with vision should be able to build at AAA quality. Sophia Foundry exists because the tools I needed didn't exist — so I built them. Every tool we release is something I use every day. That's the standard.
founderNote.name: Jessyka Gavião

about.studioText: Sophia Foundry is a game studio — not just a tool vendor. Our tools are born from real production need, battle-tested in our own projects before they ever reach another team. We build games and the infrastructure to make them at the highest quality.
about.founderBio: Senior fullstack developer and systems analyst with over 10 years of experience. Building games and the infrastructure to make them at the highest quality. Sophia Foundry is currently a one-person studio. That's not a limitation — it's proof of what the tools make possible.
about.missionText: We believe the best games come from teams empowered with the right tools. Our mission is to democratize AAA-quality development — to make the tools, workflows, and infrastructure that power the biggest studios accessible to everyone. Games worth remembering deserve tools worth building.
about.coherenceDesc: Everything connects. Our tools, our games, our process — built as one system.
about.craftDesc: Built by someone who uses it. Every feature is tested in production before it ships.
about.accessDesc: AAA for everyone. The best tools should not be locked behind the biggest budgets.

products.title: Products
products.header: We build the tools we wish existed.
products.forgeDesc: Studio operations platform for Unreal Engine 5. Full coherence, real-time collaboration, AI-powered.
products.philosophy: Every tool is battle-tested in our own productions before it reaches you.
